_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: 24h (10μM) CNO treatment was sufficient to induce a 10-fold increase in neuronal activation (GFP/c-Fos+) within the iNPC-GFP+ containing PANCOs
details: 10μM treatment for 24h induced 10-fold increase in neuronal activation (GFP/c-Fos+) and 6.9-fold increase in secreted glutamate
